title: Yvette Connevey
compiled_truth: Yvette Connevey is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-04-30), Yvette Connevey sent 57 and received 203 emails, totalling 260 interactions.
